modules.label: fortios_export_config_playbook

fields.label: access token
fields.description: Token-based authentication. Generated from GUI of Fortigate.

fields.label: enable log
fields.description: Enable/Disable logging for task.

fields.label: filters
fields.description: A list of expressions to filter the returned results. The items of the list are combined as LOGICAL AND with operator ampersand. One item itself could be concatenated with a comma as LOGICAL OR.

fields.label: formatters
fields.description: A list of fields to display for returned results.

fields.label: output path
fields.description: the path used for saving the playbook.

fields.label: params
fields.description: the parameter for each selector, see definition in above list.

fields.label: selector
fields.description: Module name that used to fetch the current configurations and export the playbook.

fields.label: sorters
fields.description: A list of expressions to sort the returned results. The items of the list are in ascending order with operator ampersand. One item itself could be in decending order with a comma inside.

fields.description: Virtual domain, among those defined previously. A vdom is a virtual instance of the FortiGate that can be configured and used as a different unit.

fields.description: A list of expressions to filter the returned results. The items of the list are combined as LOGICAL AND with operator ampersand. One item itself could be concatenated with a comma as LOGICAL OR.

fields.description: A list of fields to display for returned results.

fields.label: params
fields.description: the parameter for each selector, see definition in above list.

fields.label: selector
fields.description: selector of the retrieved fortiOS facts.

fields.label: sorters
fields.description: A list of expressions to sort the returned results. The items of the list are in ascending order with operator ampersand. One item itself could be in decending order with a comma inside.
